name: Roland Corporation
summary: Roland Corporation manufactures, markets, imports, and exports electronic musical instruments, electronic equipment, and software in Japan. The company offers digital pianos, organs, synthesizers, keyboards, guitars and bass, drums and percussions, production equipment, amplifiers, AIRA modulars, DJ controllers, grooveboxes, professional A/V products, accessories, and apps, as well as cloud services. It also provides OEM/ODM/consulting and repair services; and operates music schools, as well as online stores. Roland Corporation was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan.
